revision.comment: per edit request on talk page - update flag and link aliases
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Mongolia | flag alias = Flag of Mongolia.svg | flag alias-1911 = Flag of Bogd Khaanate Mongolia.svg | border-1911 = | flag alias-1924 = Flag of the People's Republic of Mongolia (1924-1930).svg | border-1924 = | flag alias-1924b = Flag of Mongolia 1924 (alternative).svg | border-1924b | flag alias-1940 = Flag of the People's Republic of Mongolia (1940-1945).svg | flag alias-1945 = Flag of the People's Republic of Mongolia (1945-1992).svg | flag alias-1992 = Flag of Mongolia (1992–2011).svg | flag alias-engineering force = Flag of the Construction and Engineering Force of the Mongolian Armed Forces.svg | flag alias-cyber force = Flag of the Cyber security force of the Mongolian Armed Forces.svg | flag alias-special force = Flag of the Special Force of the Mongolian Armed Forces.svg | flag alias-air force-2016 = Flag of the Mongolian Air Force.svg | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Air Force of the Mongolian Armed Forces.svg | link alias-air force = Mongolian Air Force | flag alias-army-2016 = Flag of the Mongolian Ground Force.svg | flag alias-army = Flag of the Ground Force of the Mongolian Armed Forces.svg | link alias-army = Mongolian Ground Force | flag alias-military = Flag of Mongolia.svg | link alias-military = Mongolian Armed Forces| size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1911 | var2 = 1924 | var3 = 1924b | var4 = 1940 | var5 = 1945 | var6 = 1992 | var7 = engineering force | var8 = cyber force | var9 = special force | var10 = army-2016 | redir1 = MNG | redir2 = MGL </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23362124453|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Mongolia | flag alias = Flag of Mongolia.svg | flag alias-1911 = Flag of Bogd Khaanate Mongolia.svg | border-1911 = | flag alias-1924 = Flag of the People's Republic of Mongolia (1924-1930).svg | border-1924 = | flag alias-1924b = Flag of Mongolia 1924 (alternative).svg | border-1924b | flag alias-1940 = Flag of the People's Republic of Mongolia (1940-1945).svg | flag alias-1945 = Flag of the People's Republic of Mongolia (1945-1992).svg | flag alias-1992 = Flag of Mongolia (1992–2011).svg | flag alias-engineering force = Flag of the Construction and Engineering Force of the Mongolian Armed Forces.svg | flag alias-cyber force = Flag of the Cyber security force of the Mongolian Armed Forces.svg | flag alias-special force = Flag of the Special Force of the Mongolian Armed Forces.svg | flag alias-air force-2016 = Flag of the Mongolian Air Force.svg | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Air Force of the Mongolian Armed Forces.svg | link alias-air force = Mongolian Air Force | flag alias-army-2016 = Flag of the Mongolian Ground Force.svg | flag alias-army = Flag of the Ground Force of the Mongolian Armed Forces.svg | link alias-army = Mongolian Ground Force | flag alias-military = Flag of Mongolia.svg | link alias-military = Mongolian Armed Forces| size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1911 | var2 = 1924 | var3 = 1924b | var4 = 1940 | var5 = 1945 | var6 = 1992 | var7 = engineering force | var8 = cyber force | var9 = special force | var10 = army-2016 | redir1 = MNG | redir2 = MGL </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Mongolia here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Mongolia for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Mongolia | flag alias = Flag of Mongolia.svg | flag alias-1911 = Flag of Bogd Khaanate Mongolia.svg | border-1911 = | flag alias-1924 = Flag of the People's Republic of Mongolia (1924-1930).svg | border-1924 = | flag alias-1924b = Flag of Mongolia 1924 (alternative).svg | border-1924b | flag alias-1940 = Flag of the People's Republic of Mongolia (1940-1945).svg | flag alias-1945 = Flag of the People's Republic of Mongolia (1945-1992).svg | flag alias-1992 = Flag of Mongolia (1992–2011).svg | flag alias-engineering force = Flag of the Construction and Engineering Force of the Mongolian Armed Forces.svg | flag alias-cyber force = Flag of the Cyber security force of the Mongolian Armed Forces.svg | flag alias-special force = Flag of the Special Force of the Mongolian Armed Forces.svg | flag alias-air force-2016 = Flag of the Mongolian Air Force.svg | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Air Force of the Mongolian Armed Forces.svg | link alias-air force = Mongolian Air Force | flag alias-army-2016 = Flag of the Mongolian Ground Force.svg | flag alias-army = Flag of the Ground Force of the Mongolian Armed Forces.svg | link alias-army = Mongolian Ground Force | flag alias-military = Flag of Mongolia.svg | link alias-military = Mongolian Armed Forces| size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1911 | var2 = 1924 | var3 = 1924b | var4 = 1940 | var5 = 1945 | var6 = 1992 | var7 = engineering force | var8 = cyber force | var9 = special force | var10 = army-2016 | redir1 = MNG | redir2 = MGL </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
